name: 胡貝
objective:
本校之普通物理課程專為工程科系背景之同學設計，主要的目的是鼓勵同學參與大自然運行奧秘、法則之探索，並供給爾後修習專業課程之堅實基礎。本課程之內容包含力學、熱力學、聲學、電磁學、光學及近代物理。教授者可按每週三小時、二個學期的時間設計、再參酌各系不同之需求、加強或節略某些章節。
The course is designed for the students with engineering background. The theme of this course is to encourage students to participate in the discovery of laws and wonder of nature, and to solidate the foundation for the particular courses of study for different departments. The contents of this course include mechanics, dynamics, thermodynamics, electromagnetics, optics, and foundation of modern physics, etc.. The lecturers will emphasize or abridge certain contents based on the individual needs of departments. For this course, there will be 3 credits for each of two semesters,  and 3 lecture hours per week.
schedule:
W1: Introduction 
W2: Motion along a straight line
W3: Motion in 2 and 3 Dimensions
W4: Newton’s First and Second Laws
W5: Applying Newton’s Laws
W6: Work and Kinetic Energy 
W7: Potential Energy and Conservation of Energy 
W8: Momentum and Kinetic Energy in Collisions
W9: Midterm Exam
W10~W13: Rotation, Rolling, Torque, and Angular Momentum
W14~W15: Oscillations and Waves
W16~17: Temperature, Heat and the first law of thermodynamics
W18: Final Exam

＊將視課程情況做適度調整
scorePolicy:
期中考：30%
期末考：30%
作業 / 小測驗：30%
其他 (課程參與度): 10%

提醒：
* 作弊：成績歸零
* 期中 / 期末 考試缺考：不予補考、 學期成績不及格
* 課程參與度：課堂表現、學習態度、出席情況... 等
materials: Textbook: Principles of Physics, Extended, 12/e, Halliday & Resnick`s
課程對應SDGs指標: SDG3：良好健康和福祉（Good Health and Well-being）SDG4：優質教育（Quality Education）SDG7：可負擔的潔淨能源（Affordable and Clean Energy）SDG9：產業創新與基礎設施（Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure）
